source_note: Patterns in public Highmark commercial PPO medical-policy bulletins as of 2025; SIMULATED — not authoritative.

common_denial_reasons: billed with 93017 — requires PA when combined
procedures.notes: Bare treadmill code only. Combined billing with 93017 (nuclear imaging) flips this to PA-required.

procedures.description: Transthoracic echocardiogram with spectral and color flow Doppler
common_denial_reasons: repeat study within 90 days without interval clinical change
indication does not match policy criteria
procedures.notes: Document EF measurement intent for HF management cases.

procedures.description: Catheter placement in coronary arteries with contrast injection(s) — left heart catheterization
required_documents: Prior non-invasive study (stress, CTA, MPI) OR medical-necessity bypass rationale
common_denial_reasons: missing CCS class or symptom characterization
procedures.notes: PA required. Highmark queue typically responds in 3-5 business days.

procedures.description: Comprehensive electrophysiologic evaluation with right atrial pacing and recording
required_documents: Arrhythmia documentation (Holter, event monitor, telemetry, or ECG)
procedures.notes: Plan tracks the documented arrhythmia type carefully; non-specific palpitations are not enough.
No PA for office billing; hospital-outpatient billing may face site-of-service review.
